001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.math.*;
024import java.nio.charset.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.io.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
028
029/**
030 * Reference implementation of the public {@link TokenWriter} surface for the JSON format.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Emits RFC-8259-compliant JSON.  Output style is driven by a small {@link Settings} bundle that
034 * mirrors the structurally-applicable subset of {@link JsonSerializer.Builder}'s formatting flags:
035 * <c>useWhitespace</c>, <c>maxIndent</c>, <c>quoteChar</c>, <c>escapeSolidus</c>, and
036 * <c>trimStrings</c>.  When opened via {@link JsonSerializer#serializeTokens(Object)} the writer
037 * inherits the settings from the calling serializer; constructing the writer directly via
038 * {@link #JsonTokenWriter(Writer)} uses {@link Settings#DEFAULT} (compact, double-quoted, RFC-8259
039 * strict).
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
042 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
043 *    <li>The writer tracks just enough state to insert structural separators (<c>,</c> between
044 *       array/object members and <c>:</c> between field names and values).  It does not validate
045 *       event ordering &mdash; emitting <c>field</c> twice in a row, for instance, throws.
046 *    <li>The writer is purely structural; object swaps and {@code @Schema} annotations have no
047 *       effect.  Use the POJO databind path on {@link JsonSerializer} for those.
048 * </ul>
049 */
050@SuppressWarnings({
051   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for JSON encoder dispatch
052   "resource"    // The writer's underlying Writer/OutputStream is owned by the caller via try-with-resources on the writer itself; Eclipse JDT flags the inner stream as unclosed but that's by design.
053})
054public class JsonTokenWriter implements TokenWriter {
055
056   /**
057    * Output-formatting settings honored by {@link JsonTokenWriter}.
058    *
059    * <p>
060    * This is the structurally-applicable subset of {@link JsonSerializer.Builder}.  Properties
061    * that operate on the POJO path (<c>addBeanTypes</c>, <c>keepNullProperties</c>,
062    * <c>trimEmptyMaps</c>, <c>trimEmptyCollections</c>, <c>sortMaps</c>, <c>sortCollections</c>,
063    * object swaps, and {@code @Schema} annotations) have no effect on the token surface and are
064    * deliberately not represented here.
065    *
066    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, emit indented output with newlines.
067    * @param maxIndent Maximum indentation depth when <c>useWhitespace</c> is enabled.  Levels
068    *    beyond this depth are emitted compactly.
069    * @param quoteChar The quote character used for strings and field names.  Typically
070    *    <c>'"'</c> (RFC-8259) but may be <c>'\''</c> for JSON5-style output.
071    * @param escapeSolidus If <jk>true</jk>, forward slashes (<c>/</c>) are escaped as <c>\/</c>.
072    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed from emitted
073    *    {@link TokenType#VALUE_STRING} and {@link TokenType#FIELD_NAME} values.
074    * @param simpleAttrs If <jk>true</jk>, field names are emitted unquoted when they are valid
075    *    JavaScript identifiers and not reserved words.  This is the JSON5 "lax attribute" mode;
076    *    strict RFC-8259 JSON keeps this <jk>false</jk>.
077    * @param walk The {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.PojoWalker.Options walk options} used by
078    *    {@link #object(Object) object(Object)} when walking a value graph.
079    * @param disableObject If <jk>true</jk>, {@link #object(Object) object(Object)} throws
080    *    {@link UnsupportedOperationException} with a format-specific message.  Used by formats
081    *    whose {@code serialize()} produces non-standard JSON (e.g. {@link JsonSchemaSerializer},
082    *    {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs.JcsSerializer}) where the cursor's POJO walker would
083    *    emit ordinary JSON instead of the format's special form.
084    */
085   public record Settings(
086         boolean useWhitespace,
087         int maxIndent,
088         char quoteChar,
089         boolean escapeSolidus,
090         boolean trimStrings,
091         boolean simpleAttrs,
092         PojoWalker.Options walk,
093         boolean disableObject) {
094
095      /** Default canonical setting: compact RFC-8259 JSON, double-quoted, no trimming. */
096      public static final Settings DEFAULT = new Settings(false, 100, '"', false, false, false, PojoWalker.Options.DEFAULT, false);
097   }
098
099   private static final int CTX_ROOT = 0;
100   private static final int CTX_OBJECT = 1;
101   private static final int CTX_ARRAY = 2;
102
103   private final Writer out;
104   private final Closeable owned;
105   private final boolean autoFlush;
106   private final Settings settings;
107
108   // Container stack (root, object, array): bit-packed so 64 levels are allocation-free.
109   private long ctxBits;
110   private int[] ctxOverflow;
111   private int depth;
112
113   // True if the next emit inside the current container is the first member (no leading comma).
114   private boolean firstInContainer = true;
115
116   // True if the previous structural event was field(), meaning the next emit MUST be a
117   // value (no leading comma) and must NOT trigger the first/comma logic.
118   private boolean awaitingFieldValue;
119
120   private boolean closed;
121
122   /**
123    * Constructor for a {@link Writer} target with default {@link Settings}.
124    *
125    * @param out The writer to emit JSON to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
126    */
127   public JsonTokenWriter(Writer out) {
128      this(out, null, false, Settings.DEFAULT);
129   }
130
131   /**
132    * Constructor for a {@link Writer} target with explicit {@link Settings}.
133    *
134    * @param out The writer to emit JSON to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
135    * @param settings The output-formatting settings.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
136    */
137   public JsonTokenWriter(Writer out, Settings settings) {
138      this(out, null, false, settings);
139   }
140
141   /**
142    * Internal constructor used by {@link JsonSerializer#serializeTokens(Object)} factory paths to
143    * record an underlying {@link Closeable} the writer should close on shutdown (e.g. a file
144    * stream).
145    *
146    * @param out The writer to emit JSON to.
147    * @param owned A resource owned by this writer that should be closed on close, or
148    *    <jk>null</jk>.
149    * @param autoFlush If <jk>true</jk>, flushes after every top-level emit.
150    * @param settings The output-formatting settings.
151    */
152   JsonTokenWriter(Writer out, Closeable owned, boolean autoFlush, Settings settings) {
153      assertArgNotNull("out", out);
154      assertArgNotNull("settings", settings);
155      this.out = out;
156      this.owned = owned;
157      this.autoFlush = autoFlush;
158      this.settings = settings;
159   }
160
161   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
162   public TokenWriter startObject() throws IOException {
163      assertOpen();
164      preValue();
165      out.write('{');
166      pushContext(CTX_OBJECT);
167      return this;
168   }
169
170   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
171   public TokenWriter endObject() throws IOException {
172      assertOpen();
173      var wasEmpty = firstInContainer;
174      popContext(CTX_OBJECT);
175      if (settings.useWhitespace && !wasEmpty)
176         writeNewlineAndIndent();
177      out.write('}');
178      postValue();
179      return this;
180   }
181
182   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
183   public TokenWriter startArray() throws IOException {
184      assertOpen();
185      preValue();
186      out.write('[');
187      pushContext(CTX_ARRAY);
188      return this;
189   }
190
191   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
192   public TokenWriter endArray() throws IOException {
193      assertOpen();
194      var wasEmpty = firstInContainer;
195      popContext(CTX_ARRAY);
196      if (settings.useWhitespace && !wasEmpty)
197         writeNewlineAndIndent();
198      out.write(']');
199      postValue();
200      return this;
201   }
202
203   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
204   public TokenWriter fieldName(String name) throws IOException {
205      assertOpen();
206      assertArgNotNull("name", name);
207      if (currentContext() != CTX_OBJECT)
208         throw new IllegalStateException("field called outside an object");
209      if (awaitingFieldValue)
210         throw new IllegalStateException("field called twice without an intervening value");
211      if (!firstInContainer)
212         out.write(',');
213      if (settings.useWhitespace)
214         writeNewlineAndIndent();
215      var trimmed = maybeTrim(name);
216      if (settings.simpleAttrs && isSafeBareIdentifier(trimmed))
217         out.write(trimmed);
218      else
219         writeQuotedString(trimmed);
220      out.write(':');
221      if (settings.useWhitespace)
222         out.write(' ');
223      firstInContainer = false;
224      awaitingFieldValue = true;
225      return this;
226   }
227
228   /**
229    * Returns whether the given string is safe to emit as a bare (unquoted) JSON5 field name.
230    * Conservative: requires letters / digits / underscore only, must not start with a digit,
231    * and must not be one of a small set of JavaScript reserved words.
232    */
233   private static boolean isSafeBareIdentifier(String s) {
234      if (e(s))
235         return false;
236      var first = s.charAt(0);
237      if (!(Character.isLetter(first) || first == '_'))
238         return false;
239      for (var i = 1; i < s.length(); i++) {
240         var c = s.charAt(i);
241         if (!(Character.isLetterOrDigit(c) || c == '_'))
242            return false;
243      }
244      return !RESERVED_WORDS.contains(s);
245   }
246
247   private static final java.util.Set<String> RESERVED_WORDS = java.util.Set.of(
248      "true", "false", "null", "undefined",
249      "break", "case", "catch", "class", "const", "continue", "debugger", "default", "delete",
250      "do", "else", "enum", "export", "extends", "finally", "for", "function", "if", "import",
251      "in", "instanceof", "new", "return", "super", "switch", "this", "throw", "try", "typeof",
252      "var", "void", "while", "with", "yield", "let", "static", "implements", "interface",
253      "package", "private", "protected", "public");
254
255   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
256   public TokenWriter string(String value) throws IOException {
257      assertOpen();
258      if (value == null)
259         return nil();
260      preValue();
261      writeQuotedString(maybeTrim(value));
262      postValue();
263      return this;
264   }
265
266   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
267   public TokenWriter number(Number value) throws IOException {
268      assertOpen();
269      if (value == null)
270         return nil();
271      preValue();
272      out.write(value.toString());
273      postValue();
274      return this;
275   }
276
277   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
278   public TokenWriter number(long value) throws IOException {
279      assertOpen();
280      preValue();
281      out.write(Long.toString(value));
282      postValue();
283      return this;
284   }
285
286   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
287   public TokenWriter number(double value) throws IOException {
288      assertOpen();
289      if (Double.isNaN(value) || Double.isInfinite(value))
290         throw new IOException("Cannot serialize non-finite double as JSON: " + value);
291      preValue();
292      out.write(Double.toString(value));
293      postValue();
294      return this;
295   }
296
297   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
298   public TokenWriter number(BigDecimal value) throws IOException {
299      assertOpen();
300      if (value == null)
301         return nil();
302      preValue();
303      out.write(value.toString());
304      postValue();
305      return this;
306   }
307
308   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
309   public TokenWriter number(BigInteger value) throws IOException {
310      assertOpen();
311      if (value == null)
312         return nil();
313      preValue();
314      out.write(value.toString());
315      postValue();
316      return this;
317   }
318
319   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
320   public TokenWriter bool(boolean value) throws IOException {
321      assertOpen();
322      preValue();
323      out.write(value ? "true" : "false");
324      postValue();
325      return this;
326   }
327
328   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
329   public TokenWriter nil() throws IOException {
330      assertOpen();
331      preValue();
332      out.write("null");
333      postValue();
334      return this;
335   }
336
337   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
338   public TokenWriter object(Object value) throws IOException {
339      assertOpen();
340      if (settings.disableObject)
341         throw new UnsupportedOperationException(
342            "object(Object) is not supported on this writer because the format's serialize() " +
343            "produces non-standard JSON (e.g. schema generation, canonical form).  Use the raw " +
344            "structural methods (startObject / field / string / ...) directly, or call the " +
345            "format's serialize() method.");
346      PojoWalker.walk(this, value, settings.walk);
347      return this;
348   }
349
350   /**
351    * Returns the {@link Settings} this writer was configured with.
352    *
353    * <p>
354    * Exposed for delegating wrappers (e.g. {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl.JsonlTokenWriter})
355    * that need to read the underlying writer's walk options when implementing {@link #object(Object)}.
356    *
357    * @return The settings.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
358    */
359   public Settings settingsAccess() {
360      return settings;
361   }
362
363   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
364   public TokenWriter binary(byte[] value) throws IOException {
365      assertOpen();
366      if (value == null)
367         return nil();
368      // JSON has no native binary type.  Encode as base64-encoded string per common convention.
369      preValue();
370      writeQuotedString(java.util.Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(value));
371      postValue();
372      return this;
373   }
374
375   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
376   public void flush() throws IOException {
377      out.flush();
378   }
379
380   @Override /* Overridden from TokenWriter */
381   public void close() throws IOException {
382      if (closed)
383         return;
384      closed = true;
385      try {
386         out.flush();
387      } finally {
388         if (owned != null)
389            owned.close();
390      }
391   }
392
393   // =================================================================================
394   // Helpers
395   // =================================================================================
396
397   /**
398    * Throws an {@link IOException} if this writer has been {@link #close() closed}.
399    *
400    * @throws IOException If this writer is closed.
401    */
402   private void assertOpen() throws IOException {
403      if (closed)
404         throw new IOException("Token writer is closed.");
405   }
406
407   /**
408    * Called immediately before emitting any scalar / container-start.  Inserts a leading comma
409    * if this is not the first member of an array, and clears the field-name-awaiting flag if a
410    * field name preceded the value.
411    */
412   private void preValue() throws IOException {
413      if (awaitingFieldValue) {
414         awaitingFieldValue = false;
415         return;
416      }
417      if (currentContext() == CTX_ARRAY) {
418         if (!firstInContainer)
419            out.write(',');
420         if (settings.useWhitespace)
421            writeNewlineAndIndent();
422      }
423      firstInContainer = false;
424   }
425
426   /** Called after emitting any scalar / container-end so subsequent emits see correct state. */
427   private void postValue() throws IOException {
428      if (autoFlush && currentContext() == CTX_ROOT)
429         out.flush();
430   }
431
432   private void writeNewlineAndIndent() throws IOException {
433      out.write('\n');
434      // Indent two spaces per level up to maxIndent; deeper levels emit no extra indent so the
435      // output stays usable on pathologically deep documents.
436      var levels = Math.min(depth, settings.maxIndent);
437      for (var i = 0; i < levels; i++)
438         out.write("  ");
439   }
440
441   private String maybeTrim(String s) {
442      if (!settings.trimStrings || s == null)
443         return s;
444      return s.trim();
445   }
446
447   private void pushContext(int kind) {
448      if (depth < 32) {
449         // Two bits per level: 00 = root, 01 = object, 10 = array.
450         ctxBits |= (kind & 0x3L) << (depth * 2);
451      } else {
452         if (ctxOverflow == null || depth - 32 >= ctxOverflow.length)
453            growOverflow();
454         ctxOverflow[depth - 32] = kind;
455      }
456      depth++;
457      firstInContainer = true;
458   }
459
460   private void popContext(int expectedKind) {
461      if (depth == 0)
462         throw new IllegalStateException("end-container called with no matching start-container");
463      var actual = currentContext();
464      if (actual != expectedKind)
465         throw new IllegalStateException(
466            "end-container kind mismatch: expected " + nameOfContext(expectedKind) +
467            ", got " + nameOfContext(actual));
468      // Clear the bits at the popped level so nested counts stay correct.
469      var top = depth - 1;
470      if (top < 32)
471         ctxBits &= ~(0x3L << (top * 2));
472      depth--;
473      // After closing a container, the next emit at the new depth is no longer the first member.
474      firstInContainer = false;
475      awaitingFieldValue = false;
476   }
477
478   private int currentContext() {
479      if (depth == 0)
480         return CTX_ROOT;
481      var top = depth - 1;
482      if (top < 32)
483         return (int) ((ctxBits >>> (top * 2)) & 0x3L);
484      return ctxOverflow[top - 32];
485   }
486
487   private static String nameOfContext(int kind) {
488      switch (kind) {
489         case CTX_ROOT:   return "root";
490         case CTX_OBJECT: return "object";
491         case CTX_ARRAY:  return "array";
492         default:         return "unknown";
493      }
494   }
495
496   private void growOverflow() {
497      var n = ctxOverflow == null ? 16 : ctxOverflow.length << 1;
498      var bigger = new int[n];
499      if (ctxOverflow != null)
500         System.arraycopy(ctxOverflow, 0, bigger, 0, ctxOverflow.length);
501      ctxOverflow = bigger;
502   }
503
504   private void writeQuotedString(String s) throws IOException {
505      var q = settings.quoteChar;
506      out.write(q);
507      // Escape: the active quote char, backslash, and control chars 0x00-0x1F.  Optionally
508      // escape forward slashes when settings.escapeSolidus is set.
509      for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
510         var c = s.charAt(i);
511         if (c == q) {
512            out.write('\\');
513            out.write(q);
514            continue;
515         }
516         switch (c) {
517            case '\\': out.write("\\\\"); break;
518            case '\b': out.write("\\b"); break;
519            case '\f': out.write("\\f"); break;
520            case '\n': out.write("\\n"); break;
521            case '\r': out.write("\\r"); break;
522            case '\t': out.write("\\t"); break;
523            case '/':
524               if (settings.escapeSolidus)
525                  out.write("\\/");
526               else
527                  out.write(c);
528               break;
529            default:
530               if (c < 0x20)
531                  out.write(String.format("\\u%04x", (int) c));
532               else
533                  out.write(c);
534         }
535      }
536      out.write(q);
537   }
538
539   // =================================================================================
540   // Static factory used by JsonSerializer.serializeTokens(Object)
541   // =================================================================================
542
543   /**
544    * Internal factory used by {@link JsonSerializer#serializeTokens(Object)}.  Coerces the supported
545    * output types ({@link Writer} / {@link OutputStream} / {@link File} / {@link StringBuilder})
546    * into a {@link Writer} the JSON encoder can target.
547    *
548    * @param output The output object.
549    * @param settings The output-formatting settings.
550    * @return A new {@link JsonTokenWriter} writing to the resolved {@link Writer}.
551    * @throws IOException If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.
552    */
553   public static JsonTokenWriter forOutput(Object output, Settings settings) throws IOException {
554      if (output == null)
555         throw new IOException("Output cannot be null.");
556      if (output instanceof Writer w)
557         return new JsonTokenWriter(w, null, false, settings);
558      if (output instanceof OutputStream os)
559         return new JsonTokenWriter(new OutputStreamWriter(os, StandardCharsets.UTF_8), null, true, settings);
560      if (output instanceof File f) {
561         var os = new BufferedOutputStream(new FileOutputStream(f));
562         var w = new OutputStreamWriter(os, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
563         return new JsonTokenWriter(w, os, true, settings);
564      }
565      if (output instanceof StringBuilder sb)
566         return new JsonTokenWriter(new StringBuilderWriter(sb), null, false, settings);
567      throw new IOException("Cannot convert object of type " + output.getClass().getName() + " to a Writer.");
568   }
569}
